intro: Bulbophyllum infracarinatum, also known as the Infracarinatum orchid, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar, characterized by its unique flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
